steps.title: Price the promotion
steps.content: The first class costs $0$ dollars. The second class costs half of $28.80$, which is $14.40$ dollars.

steps.title: Count full-price classes
steps.content: For $x>2$, the remaining number of classes is $x-2$, and each costs $28.80$ dollars.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content: Add the half-price class to the full-price classes: $$ f(x)=28.80(x-2)+14.40 $$ The answer is B.
